creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
mail/dovecot2-antispam-plugin was originally DEPRECATED in ports r440341 with message:

Has expired: Use pigeonhole instead. See https://wiki2.dovecot.org/HowTo/AntispamWithSieve

The mail/dovecot2-antispam-plugin was subsequently deleted (and added to MOVED) after EXPIRATION_DATE was reached in ports r446988 with a pointer to a replacement port: mail/dovecot2-pigeonhole

I hope that clarifies things. Please close this issue as Closed/FIXED if you are satisfied with that explanation as a resolution.
